meta.title: Arthroscopic Surgery — Minimally Invasive | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Minimally invasive arthroscopic surgery of the shoulder, elbow, knee and ankle: small incisions, less tissue damage and a faster recovery. Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, 37 years of experience, seeing patients through Maccabi.

shoulder.metaDescription: Shoulder arthroscopy: rotator cuff repair, stabilization after dislocations and treatment of impingement syndrome — how the surgery is performed, who it suits and what recovery looks like.

elbow.metaDescription: Elbow arthroscopy: removal of loose bodies, release of stiffness and treatment of tennis elbow that has not responded to conservative care — when surgery is considered and how it proceeds.

knee.metaDescription: Knee arthroscopy: treatment of meniscus tears, ligament reconstruction and cartilage procedures — the advantages of a minimally invasive approach and the stages of recovery.

ankleFoot.metaTitle: Ankle & Foot Arthroscopy | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
ankleFoot.metaDescription: Ankle and foot arthroscopy: impingement syndrome, cartilage lesions and chronic instability — precise diagnosis, minimally invasive surgery and a structured recovery plan.

preparation.metaTitle: Preparing for Arthroscopic Surgery — Patient Guide | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
preparation.metaDescription: How to prepare for arthroscopic surgery: pre-operative tests, medications to report, fasting instructions, what to bring on the day of surgery and how to get your home ready — a practical, reassuring guide.

rehabilitation.metaTitle: Rehabilitation After Arthroscopic Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
rehabilitation.metaDescription: The first day after arthroscopic surgery and rehabilitation guidelines: dressing care, icing, pain management, recovery phases in week ranges, physiotherapy and a gradual return to activity.

insuranceForms.metaTitle: Insurance Claim Forms for Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
insuranceForms.metaDescription: Which documents the clinic provides for a surgical insurance claim, how the process with your insurer typically works and what Maccabi members should know — a clear guide for patients.

shoulder.title: Arthroscopic Shoulder Surgery
shoulder.description: Rotator cuff repair, shoulder stabilization after dislocations and treatment of impingement — all through small incisions.

elbow.title: Elbow Arthroscopy
elbow.description: Loose bodies in the joint, stiffness and tennis elbow that has not responded to conservative care — a minimally invasive solution.

knee.title: Arthroscopic Knee Surgery
knee.description: Treatment of meniscus tears, ligament reconstruction and cartilage procedures using a minimally invasive approach.

ankleFoot.title: Ankle & Foot Arthroscopy
ankleFoot.description: Impingement syndrome, cartilage lesions and chronic ankle instability — focused diagnosis and treatment.

preparation.title: Preparing for Surgery — Patient Information
preparation.description: Tests, medications, fasting and what to bring on the day of surgery — an organized checklist to help you arrive prepared and calm.

rehabilitation.title: Postoperative Rehabilitation
rehabilitation.description: The first day after surgery and rehabilitation guidelines: recovery phases, physiotherapy and a gradual return to routine.

insuranceForms.title: Insurance Claim Forms
insuranceForms.description: Which documents you will receive from the clinic and how the process with your insurer works — including information for Maccabi members.
